description_long: This is a compact, two-seater sofa upholstered in a mustard yellow fabric with a subtle matte finish. The seat features two large, uniform cushions, while the backrest is gently curved and adorned with a row of evenly spaced button tufting for added visual interest. The armrests are rounded and slightly flared, rising just above the seat level and seamlessly integrated into the sofa's silhouette. The sofa stands on four short, turned wooden legs with a dark finish, each positioned at the corners for stability. The back of the sofa is plain and unadorned, maintaining the same upholstery as the front and sides. Overall, the design is classic and inviting, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A mustard yellow, two-seater sofa with button-tufted backrest, rounded armrests, and short turned wooden legs. The design is classic and compact, with a smooth matte fabric finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the button-tufted backrest, two seat cushions, and rounded armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the gentle curve of the backrest and the flared armrest profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the plain, continuous backrest with no visible tufting or detailing.
description_view_3: Angled view reveals the sofa's depth, cushion arrangement, and the integration of armrests with the backrest.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, attached seat cushions and a single continuous backrest with button tufting; cushions are uniform in size and fixed in place.
attribute_armrest_style: Present, rounded and slightly flared armrests that rise just above seat level, smoothly integrated with the sofa's body and fully upholstered.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, turned wooden legs with a dark finish, positioned at each corner and slightly exposed beneath the sofa.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-high, gently curved, continuous backrest with button tufting and no segmentation; fully upholstered.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid mustard yellow fabric with visible button tufting on the backrest; the surface appears smooth and matte with no additional patterns.
